title: salix × guichardii
intro: Salix × guichardii is a hybrid willow species, a cross between Salix × fragilis and Salix viminalis. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its bark and leaves, which contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × guichardii include its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Salix × guichardii can be made from its bark and leaves, often infused in hot water to create a tea or used in tinctures and salves.
